commonProblems.h2: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Alpha Romeo Stelvio's engine reliability varies significantly by powertrain: the 2.0 Turbo GME T4 petrol suffers timing chain issues, while 2.2 JTDm diesels face DPF/AdBlue complexity. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the cost comparisons below to decide whether repair or replacement offers better value for your Stelvio.

problems.group: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Fuel Pump Recall Failure
problems.h4: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Fuel Pump Recall Failure - Why 2018-2019 Models Stall Without Warning
problems.affectedModels: Alpha Romeo Stelvio 2.0 Turbo and 2.2 JTDm (2018-2019, all engine codes including 55273835, 55284529, 55275156)
problems.rootCause: Defective fuel delivery module can fail catastrophically without warning, causing sudden engine shutdown while driving. Linked to five crashes and three injuries; 24,382 Stelvio SUVs affected by DVSA recall.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty fuel delivery module under recall; ECU reset and road test
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent fix if recall part fitted; does not address any secondary engine damage from stalling

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full diagnostic scan, compression test, address any damage from sudden shutdown (e.g. valve timing)
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if stalling event caused minimal damage; risk of hidden issues

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt engine with upgraded fuel system components, Q4 calibration, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if stalling caused internal damage; eliminates recall risk permanently

problems.recommendation: If your Stelvio experienced sudden stalling, do not assume a simple pump replacement will suffice. We recommend a full compression test and leak-down inspection before committing to repairs. On a Stelvio worth £15,000-£25,000, a rebuilt engine at £2,500-£4,500 often represents better long-term value than repeated diagnostics and partial repairs.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt engine prices for your 2018-2019 Alpha Romeo Stelvio

problems.group: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Timing Chain Failure
problems.h4: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Timing Chain Failure - Why Petrol and Diesel Engines Rattle at 40k-60k Miles
problems.affectedModels: Alpha Romeo Stelvio 2.0 Turbo (55273835, 50053653) and 2.2 JTDm diesel (55275156, 55284529) variants, 2017-2024
problems.rootCause: Timing chain tensioner wear allows chain stretch, causing rattling on cold startup. If ignored, chain can skip teeth or snap, causing catastrophic valve/piston collision.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Preventative Timing Chain Kit Replacement
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace chain, tensioners, guides before failure; includes oil change and ECU adaptation
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early with no valve damage; prevents catastrophic failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt engine with upgraded timing components, Q4 system calibration, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if chain has skipped or engine has suffered internal damage; eliminates future timing concerns

problems.recommendation: If you hear a metallic rattle on cold startup, act immediately. A preventative chain kit at £900-£1,600 is excellent value. But if the engine has run with a skipped chain, replacement is almost always more economical than attempting a top-end rebuild. On a Stelvio, the Q4 system integration makes specialist fitting essential either way.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Alpha Romeo Stelvio timing chain replacement or rebuilt engine

problems.group: Alpha Romeo Stelvio DPF and AdBlue System Failure
problems.h4: Alpha Romeo Stelvio DPF and AdBlue System Failure - Why Diesel Owners Face £2,000+ Repair Bills
problems.affectedModels: Alpha Romeo Stelvio 2.2 JTDm diesel variants (55275156, 55284529, 73504077, 73504439, A025), 2017-2022
problems.rootCause: Short-journey urban driving prevents DPF regeneration (requires 20+ minutes at 2,500+ rpm every 500km). AdBlue consumption ~1.5L/1000km; low fluid or pump failure triggers no-start protection. Combined repairs often exceed £2,000.

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - DPF Clean + AdBlue System Repair
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Off-car DPF cleaning/replacement, AdBlue pump/injector repair, ECU reset and forced regeneration
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if engine itself is healthy; does not prevent recurrence if driving pattern unchanged

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Diesel Engine with Updated Emissions
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt 2.2 JTDm with Euro 6D compliance, updated DPF strategy, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if multiple emissions faults present; eliminates recurring repair cycle

problems.recommendation: If your Stelvio diesel has multiple emissions warnings (DPF, AdBlue, EGR) and repair quotes exceed £2,000, replacement often makes more sense. A rebuilt engine at £3,200-£4,500 includes updated components and a warranty - far better value than repeated partial repairs. Ensure any replacement is Euro 6D compliant for ULEZ access.
problems.cta: Compare Alpha Romeo Stelvio 2.2 diesel replacement engine prices

problems.group: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Power Control Module Failure
problems.h4: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Power Control Module Failure - Why Engines Lose Power Without Warning
problems.affectedModels: Alpha Romeo Stelvio all variants (2017-2024, all engine codes)
problems.rootCause: PCM software/hardware faults cause sudden loss of power, sluggish acceleration, or stalling. Warning light appears with no prior indication; often misdiagnosed as mechanical engine failure.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Dealer-level diagnostic scan, PCM software update, adaptation reset
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if PCM hardware is intact; does not address any engine damage from sudden power loss

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit replacement PCM, code to vehicle VIN, Q4 system recalibration
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if PCM is faulty but engine undamaged; requires specialist diagnostic equipment

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine (if PCM failure caused damage)
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: If sudden power loss caused mechanical damage, supply and fit rebuilt engine with new PCM, full calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if engine suffered damage from abrupt shutdown or misfire events

problems.recommendation: Always start with a full diagnostic scan before assuming mechanical failure. If PCM codes are present but compression is good, reprogramming or PCM replacement may suffice. But if the sudden power loss caused misfires, overheating, or valve damage, a rebuilt engine at £2,500-£4,500 often represents better long-term value than repeated electrical repairs.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Alpha Romeo Stelvio PCM diagnosis or engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Alpha Romeo Stelvio
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you're facing a fuel pump recall, timing chain rattle, DPF warning, or PCM fault, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Alpha Romeo Stelvio specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, plus a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Don't pay main dealer premiums - compare quotes and get back on the road with confidence.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Alpha Romeo Stelvio Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Alpha Romeo Stelvio and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Alpha Romeo Stelvio is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

groups.title: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Diesel Engine Sizes

items.title: Alpha Romeo Stelvio 2.2L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.2L JTDm diesel powered every diesel Stelvio variant from launch in 2017 through 2022, offered in four power outputs (150hp, 180hp, 190hp, 210hp) across Super, Executive, Veloce Q4 and Lusso Ti trims. Its complex Euro 6 emissions systems drive significant replacement demand when DPF or AdBlue repairs exceed £2,000.
commonFailurePoints: DPF regeneration failure on short journeys
balance shaft bolt loosening on early units
items.cta: Get quotes for Alpha Romeo Stelvio 2.2L diesel engines

groups.title: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Petrol Engine Sizes

items.title: Alpha Romeo Stelvio 2.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.0L Turbo GME T4 petrol engine powered the majority of UK Stelvio sales from 2017-2024 across Super, Speciale, Veloce, Ti and facelift variants. Its 280hp output and widespread adoption make it the most searched-for replacement, though timing chain vulnerability at 40k-60k miles drives significant enquiry volume.
commonFailurePoints: carbon fibre propshaft damage from Q4 system stress
coil pack misfires at higher mileage
items.cta: Compare Alpha Romeo Stelvio 2.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Alpha Romeo Stelvio 2.9L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.9L Bi-Turbo V6, derived from Ferrari architecture, exclusively powers the Quadrifoglio performance flagship. Its 510hp output and specialist components command premium replacement pricing, with Q4 system integration and carbon fibre drivetrain parts requiring expert fitting knowledge.
commonFailurePoints: Timing chain tensioner wear on high-performance V6
Bi-Turbo oil starvation risk if service intervals missed
Q4 transfer case calibration complexity post-replacement
items.cta: Compare Alpha Romeo Stelvio 2.9L petrol engine prices

items.title: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.2L JTDm diesel powered all diesel Stelvio variants from 2017-2022, offering strong torque and motorway economy but complex emissions systems that drive replacement demand when repairs exceed £2,000.
items.descriptor: The 2.2L JTDm diesel powered all diesel Stelvio variants from 2017-2022, offering strong torque and motorway economy but complex emissions systems that drive replacement demand when repairs exceed £2,000.
items.familiesLabel: Common Alpha Romeo Stelvio Diesel Engine Families
families: 55275156 - Entry-level 150-180hp unit for Super/Executive trims; DPF/AdBlue complexity
55284529 - High-output 190-210hp for Q4/luxury trims; increased AWD system stress
73504077/73504439 - Post-recall revised codes for 2020+ models; updated fuel delivery
foundIn: Pre-facelift Stelvio (2017-2019) - All diesel variants with original fuel pump design
Facelift Stelvio (2020-2022) - Revised fuel pump, Euro 6D compliance across all diesel trims
knownFor: Strong motorway fuel economy and torque for towing/hauling
DPF regeneration requires 20+ minutes at 2,500+ rpm every 500km - problematic for urban drivers
AdBlue consumption ~1.5L/1000km; low fluid triggers no-start protection
High UK replacement demand on 2.2 JTDm units with multiple emissions faults

engineYears.h2: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Stelvio's production timeline from 2017-present, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The Stelvio launched on the Giorgio platform with two core engines: the 280hp 2.0 Turbo petrol and multiple-output 2.2 JTDm diesel, plus the flagship Quadrifoglio V6.
keyChanges: Alfa Romeo Stelvio launched in UK market on shared Giorgio platform with Giulia
2.0 Turbo GME T4 (55273835) and 2.2 JTDm diesel (multiple codes) introduced across Super/Speciale/Veloce trims
Quadrifoglio flagship launched with Ferrari-derived 2.9L Bi-Turbo V6 (670050436)
Q4 all-wheel drive system standard on higher trims and all diesel variants
mainEngines: 55284529 - 2.2L diesel JTDm (190-210hp) (Business Q4, Veloce Q4, Lusso Ti)
popularModels: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Veloce Q4 2.2 Diesel
knownFor: Strong driving dynamics and Italian styling appeal to SUV buyers
Fuel pump recall announced for 2018-2019 models - sudden stalling risk (24,382 vehicles)
Timing chain vulnerability on 2.0 Turbo emerging at 40k-60k miles
DPF/AdBlue complexity on diesel variants problematic for urban drivers
years.cta: Get quotes for 2017-2019 Alpha Romeo Stelvio replacement engines
years.ticker: Stelvio fuel pump recall • 2.0 Turbo timing chain rattle • 2.2 diesel DPF blocked • Quadrifoglio V6 specialist replacement

years.preview: Facelift Generation: Revised Fuel Pump & Euro 6D Compliance
years.description: The 2020 facelift introduced revised fuel pumps addressing the recall issue, updated infotainment, and Euro 6D emissions compliance across the diesel range.
keyChanges: Revised fuel delivery module fitted to address sudden stalling recall on 2018-2019 models
Updated infotainment system with larger touchscreen and improved connectivity
Diesel engines updated to Euro 6D emissions standard with revised AdBlue strategy
Final year for diesel Stelvio production in UK market (2022)
popularModels: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Super 2.0 Turbo Facelift
Alpha Romeo Stelvio Veloce Q4 2.2 Diesel Euro 6D
knownFor: Revised fuel pump eliminates sudden stalling risk on post-2019 models
Euro 6D compliance ensures ULEZ access for diesel variants through 2022
DPF/AdBlue complexity remains - short-journey driving still problematic
Timing chain concerns persist on 2.0 Turbo - preventative replacement recommended at 50k miles
years.cta: Get quotes for 2020-2022 Alpha Romeo Stelvio replacement engines
years.ticker: Stelvio Euro 6D diesel replacement • Facelift 2.0 Turbo engine • Post-recall fuel pump verification • Quadrifoglio specialist fitting

years.preview: Final Generation: Petrol-Only Range & Updated Styling
years.description: The final Stelvio generation discontinued diesel engines in the UK, focusing on the 2.0 Turbo petrol across all trims plus the Quadrifoglio V6, with updated styling and technology.
keyChanges: Diesel engines discontinued in UK market; petrol-only range from 2023
Updated exterior styling with revised front grille and LED lighting signature
Enhanced driver assistance systems and connectivity features
Quadrifoglio continues with unchanged 2.9L Bi-Turbo V6 performance
mainEngines: 55273835 - 2.0L petrol turbo (280hp) (All petrol trims, final production code)
popularModels: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Veloce Ti 2.0 Turbo
knownFor: Petrol-only range simplifies replacement decisions for post-2023 models
Timing chain vulnerability remains on 2.0 Turbo - verify service history before purchase
Quadrifoglio V6 continues to command premium pricing and specialist fitting requirements
Strong residual values for well-maintained examples support engine replacement investment
years.cta: Get quotes for 2023-2024 Alpha Romeo Stelvio replacement engines
years.ticker: 2023+ Stelvio 2.0 Turbo engine • Quadrifoglio V6 specialist replacement • Petrol-only Stelvio compatibility • Final generation engine pricing

faq.h2: Alpha Romeo Stelvio Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace an Alpha Romeo Stelvio engine?
items.answer: Alpha Romeo Stelvio engine replacement costs range from £2,500-£3,800 for 2.0 Turbo petrol units, £2,800-£4,500 for 2.2 diesel variants, and £7,000-£15,000+ for Quadrifoglio V6 engines, supply only.
keyPoints: 2.0 Turbo petrol (55273835): £2,500-£3,800 rebuilt supply only
2.2 diesel JTDm (55275156/55284529): £2,800-£4,500 rebuilt supply only
Quadrifoglio V6 (670050436): £7,000-£15,000+ rebuilt supply only
Supply & fit labour typically adds £800-£1,800 depending on variant complexity
All prices include minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from UK specialists
items.cta: Compare Alpha Romeo Stelvio engine replacement prices for your variant

items.question: What is the most reliable engine for the Alpha Romeo Stelvio?
items.answer: The post-2020 2.0 Turbo petrol (55273835) with revised fuel pump offers the best balance of reliability and running costs for most Stelvio owners in the UK.
keyPoints: Post-2020 2.0 Turbo units have revised fuel pump eliminating stalling recall risk
Avoid 2018-2019 models unless fuel pump recall completion is verified
Diesel variants face DPF/AdBlue complexity problematic for urban driving patterns
Quadrifoglio V6 is reliable when serviced correctly but commands premium repair costs
Always verify full service history and timing chain condition on higher-mileage examples
items.cta: Get quotes for reliable Alpha Romeo Stelvio replacement engines

items.question: Is the Alpha Romeo Stelvio affected by the fuel pump recall?
items.answer: Yes, 24,382 Stelvio SUVs from 2018-2019 model years are affected by a fuel pump recall that can cause sudden stalling with no warning, linked to five crashes and three injuries.
keyPoints: Recall affects both 2.0 Turbo petrol and 2.2 JTDm diesel variants from 2018-2019
Defective fuel delivery module can fail catastrophically without prior warning signs
Post-2020 models have revised fuel pump design addressing the failure mode
Always verify recall completion via DVSA checker before purchasing a used Stelvio
If stalling has occurred, inspect for secondary engine damage before repair decisions
items.cta: Check if your Alpha Romeo Stelvio is affected by the fuel pump recall

items.question: What causes timing chain failure on the Alpha Romeo Stelvio?
items.answer: Timing chain stretch on the Stelvio's 2.0 Turbo and 2.2 diesel engines is commonly caused by tensioner wear at 40,000-60,000 miles, leading to rattling on cold startup and potential catastrophic valve damage if ignored.
keyPoints: Metallic rattle on cold startup is the primary warning sign of chain stretch
Preventative chain kit replacement costs £900-£1,600 if caught early
If chain has skipped teeth, rebuilt engine at £2,500-£4,500 often better value than top-end repair
Q4 system calibration essential after any timing-related work on Stelvio variants
Use only specialists with Stelvio-specific diagnostic equipment for timing repairs
items.cta: Get quotes for Alpha Romeo Stelvio timing chain replacement or rebuilt engine

items.question: Should I repair or replace my Alpha Romeo Stelvio engine?
items.answer: Replacement typically offers better value than repair when diagnostic costs exceed £2,000, multiple faults are present, or the vehicle is worth £15,000+ with strong service history.
keyPoints: If repair quotes exceed £2,000, rebuilt engine at £2,500-£4,500 often better long-term value
Rebuilt engines include upgraded components addressing original failure points
12-month unlimited mileage warranty on replacements provides peace of mind
Consider vehicle value, mileage, and service history when deciding repair vs replace
Specialist fitting essential for Q4 system calibration regardless of repair path chosen
items.cta: Compare Alpha Romeo Stelvio engine repair vs replacement costs

items.question: Can I fit a Giulia engine in my Alpha Romeo Stelvio?
items.answer: Yes, the 2.0 Turbo GME T4 engines are interchangeable between Giulia and Stelvio as both use the Giorgio platform, but Q4 all-wheel drive calibration differs and requires specialist attention.
keyPoints: 2.0 Turbo petrol (55273835) and 2.2 diesel codes are shared between Giulia and Stelvio
Q4 all-wheel drive system on Stelvio requires specific calibration after engine swap
ECU coding must match Stelvio variant power output and emissions specification
Carbon fibre propshaft handling on Stelvio demands specialist fitting expertise
Always confirm engine code and Q4 compatibility before sourcing a donor engine
items.cta: Get quotes for compatible Alpha Romeo Stelvio replacement engines

items.question: What engine codes fit the Alpha Romeo Stelvio?
items.answer: The primary Stelvio engine codes are 55273835 (2.0 Turbo petrol), 55275156/55284529 (2.2 diesel JTDm), and 670050436 (2.9 V6 Quadrifoglio), with additional variant-specific codes requiring precise matching.
keyPoints: 55273835: Dominant 280hp 2.0 Turbo petrol code across all petrol trims
55275156: 150-180hp 2.2 diesel for entry-level Super/Executive variants
55284529: 190-210hp 2.2 diesel for Q4 and luxury trim variants
670050436: Exclusive 510hp 2.9 V6 Bi-Turbo for Quadrifoglio only
Always verify exact code via VIN or registration lookup before ordering replacement
items.cta: Find your Alpha Romeo Stelvio engine code and compare replacement prices

items.question: How long does an Alpha Romeo Stelvio engine replacement take?
items.answer: A typical Alpha Romeo Stelvio engine replacement takes 2-4 working days for supply & fit, depending on variant complexity, Q4 system calibration requirements, and specialist workshop availability.
keyPoints: Standard 2.0 Turbo or 2.2 diesel replacement: 2-3 working days typical
Quadrifoglio V6 or complex Q4 variants: 3-4 working days due to specialist calibration
Supply-only engines can be delivered nationwide within 1-2 working days
Road test and ECU adaptation included in specialist fitting service
Book in advance during peak seasons to secure preferred workshop slots
items.cta: Find Alpha Romeo Stelvio engine supply & fit specialists near you

Quadrifoglio V6 replacements often eligible for extended 24-month warranty options
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects on rebuilt units
Always confirm exact warranty terms with your chosen supplier before booking

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine on an Alpha Romeo Stelvio?
items.answer: Yes, engine replacement is typically worth it for Stelvios valued over £15,000 with good service history, as rebuilt units at £2,500-£4,500 restore reliability with warranty protection.
keyPoints: Stelvio residual values support investment in quality rebuilt engines
Rebuilt units include upgraded components addressing known failure points
12-month warranty provides protection against repeat issues post-replacement
Consider total vehicle value, mileage, and intended ownership period
Specialist fitting ensures Q4 system integrity and long-term reliability
